title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on agent), and Majorana 2 (quantum hardware). The release represents Microsoft's effort to build a full-stack AI offering to compete with OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic.
